popularStory.headline: Béatrice de Savoie (1198-1266)
popularStory.description: Béatrix de Savoie (ou Béatrice), née en 1198 et morte en 1265 ou 1266 au château de Menuet (Les Échelles), est fille aînée de Thomas Ier (v. 1177-1233), 9e comte de Savoie (1189-1233), et de Béatrice …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Savoie於1198年11月1日出生在法國迪瑟 德 哈恩貝利時，她的父親Thomas de Savoie I20歲，母親Marguerite de Genève18歲。她於1219年6月5日與Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年1月4日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達哈貝爾享年68歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Savoie于1198年11月1日出生在法国迪瑟 德 哈恩貝利时，她的父亲Thomas de Savoie I20岁，母亲Marguerite de Genève18岁。她于1219年6月5日与Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年1月4日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達哈貝爾享年68岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Savoie was born on 1 November 1198, in Diocese of Chambéry, France, her father, Thomas de Savoie I, was 20 and her mother, Marguerite de Genève, was 18. She married Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV on 5 June 1219, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 4 January 1267, in Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Savoie est née le 1 novembre 1198, à Diocèse de Chambéry, France, son père, Thomas de Savoie I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Genève, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV le 5 juin 1219, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 janvier 1267, à Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Savoie am 1. November 1198 in Diocèse de Chambéry, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Savoie I 20 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Genève 18. Sie hat am 5. Juni 1219 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Januar 1267 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Savoie è nata il il 1 novembre 1198 nel Diocèse de Chambéry, Francia, sua padre, Thomas de Savoie I, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Genève, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV il 5 giugno 1219, nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 gennaio 1267, nel Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Savoieが1198年11月1日にフランスディオクeゼ ド チャンブeリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Savoie Iは20歳，母Marguerite de Genèveは18歳であった。1219年6月5日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスでCount Raimond Berenger de Provence IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年1月4日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルチャンベアイアで68歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-デ-クウルティルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Savoie(이)가 1198년 11월 1일 프랑스 디오ce스 데 챔브e리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Savoie I(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Genève(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1219년 6월 5일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 1월 4일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 챔브이르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-데-커틸에 묻혔다.

mn.1 November 1198–4 January 1267: 1198 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 1–1267 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 4
mn.Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, Uni: Berkhamsted, Heorotfordscír, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.1 November 1198–4 January 1267: 1 de novembro de 1198–4 de janeiro de 1267
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Savoie nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1198, em Diocèse de Chambéry, França, seu pai, Thomas de Savoie I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Genève, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV em 5 de junho de 1219, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1267, em Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Savoie родилась 1 ноября 1198 г. в местности диокeс де чамбeри, Франция, её отцу по имени Thomas de Savoie I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Genève, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV 5 июня 1219 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 января 1267 г. в местности чамбир, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-пьирре-де-куртилл, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.From 1220 to 1245: mai le 1220 e o'o I le 1245

es.1 November 1198–4 January 1267: 1 de noviembre de 1198–4 de enero de 1267
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Savoie nació el 1 de noviembre de 1198, en Diocèse de Chambéry, Francia, su papá, Thomas de Savoie I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Genève, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV el 5 de junio de 1219, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de enero de 1267, en Chambeire, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
